# Title

## Highlights {.unnumbered}

- highlight 1
- highlight 2

## Preparation

(Pre-class reading and exercises)

## Body

What will be covered in class plus exercises

:::{.callout-tip collapse="true"}

#### Hint

A collapsed hint.
:::

## More sections

More content

## Review Questions {.unnumbered}

1. Question 1
2. Question 2
